payload.answer: Committed supported memories: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans and lately more early Coltrane; Sam and Daniele discussed catching up about AI infra and Sam asked for an article to be sent.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

Sam still listens to Bill Evans and has lately been listening more to early Coltrane.

details: Employment update committed with Goldman treated as former employer and Point72 as current employer.
